## Chore/Refactor Sub-Issue

Parent: #<epic-number>

Title: <chore/refactor title>

### Scope
- What is being improved or refactored?
- Constraints and non-goals

### Acceptance Checklist
- [ ] Change implemented with no functional regressions
- [ ] Tests adjusted or added
- [ ] Docs or ADRs updated if architecture changes
- [ ] CI green

### Risk & Rollback
- Risk level: <low/medium/high>
- Rollback plan

### Notes
- Dependencies, sequencing considerations
